requirements.title: Create a todo
requirements.text: A POST /todos with a title creates a todo, returns its generated id, and marks it done:false. A request with no title is rejected (negative path).

strictnessLadder.description: the todo is in the in-memory store

requirements.title: List todos
requirements.text: GET /todos returns every todo that has been created, in creation order.

requirements.title: Delete a todo
requirements.text: DELETE /todos/:id removes the todo so it no longer appears in the list. Removal should ultimately be confirmable from the user-facing surface (a browser viewing the list), not only from the API response.

strictnessLadder.description: the todo is removed from the store
a browser viewing the list confirms the item is gone

requirements.title: Update a todo
requirements.text: PATCH /todos/:id changes a todo's title or done state and returns the updated todo. Not yet implemented or tested.
